# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: webapp-deployment
  labels:
    app: webapp
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: webapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: webapp
        image: your-webapp-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: webapp-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: webapp
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backgroundworker-deployment
  labels:
    app: backgroundworker
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backgroundworker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backgroundworker
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: backgroundworker
        image: your-backgroundworker-image:latest
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_SERVICE_NAME
          value: memcached-service
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backgroundworker-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: backgroundworker
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
